item.title: How Nursa built a new product in 48 hours and changed how its entire company ships software
item.description: Nursa is a healthcare staffing marketplace connecting 5,000+ facilities to 500,000+ nurses. After VP of Product Nenad Ivanovic built a net-new enterprise product in a single weekend using Lovable, the CEO went all in: giving all 200+ employees access. Teams from finance to compliance are building with Lovable and Nursa is set to retire over 10 SaaS contracts.
